---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-09-28"
---

```{r}
# Packages
library(kableExtra)
library(scales)
library(ggthemes)
library(tictoc)
library(tidyverse)

confounders <- c("age", "sex","square root of age", "country","education","age squared","region (6 levels)", "smoking ever", "income (tertiles)", "children (y/n)", "education (as restricted splines", "hypertension", "lipid disorder", "diabetes","smoking", "hypercholesterolaemia", "BMI", "physical activity", "depression", "self-perceived health", "having a job", "hospital stay in the last 12 months", "increased value of cholesterol", "intake of cardiovascular drugs", "chronic diseases") # check if some things are not the same (like cholesterol)

outcomes <- c("Ph006d1, ph006d4: Heart attack / stroke ever", "Ph009_1, ph009_4: 
Age at heart attack / stroke", "Ph067_1, ph067_2 / ph072_1, ph072_2: 
Heart attack / stroke since last interview", "Xt011_: Main cause of death heart attack / stroke")

exposure <- c("never married", "cohabiting married") # check other variables

library(specr)
tic()
results_specr <- run_specs(
  df = dat,
  y = c("y1", "y2"),
  x = c("x1", "x2"),
  model = c("lm", "glm"),
  controls = c("c1", "c2"),
  subsets = list(group = unique(dat$group))
)
toc()

?run_specs
```

```{r}
library(dagitty)
library(ggdag)
library(ggplot2)

g <- dagify(
X1 ~ Y,
X12 ~ Y,
X123 ~ Y,
X1234 ~ Y,
X2 ~ Y,
X23 ~ Y,
X234 ~ Y, 
X3~ Y ,
X34~ Y ,
X4 ~ Y,

C1X1 ~ X1,
C1X12 ~ X12,
C1X123 ~ X123,
C1X1234 ~ X1234,
C1X2 ~ X2,
C1X23 ~ X23,
C1X234 ~ X234,
C1X3 ~ X3,
C1X34 ~ X34,
C1X4 ~ X4,

C2X1 ~ X1,
C2X12 ~ X12,
C2X123 ~ X123,
C2X1234 ~ X1234,
C2X2 ~ X2,
C2X23 ~ X23,
C2X234 ~ X234,
C2X3 ~ X3,
C2X34 ~ X34,
C2X4 ~ X4,

  exposure = "Y",

coords = list(
     x = c(
       X1 = -2,
       X12 = -1.5,
       X123 = -1, 
       X1234 = -0.5,
       X2 = 0,
       Y = 0.5,
       X23 = 0.5,
       X234 = 1,
       X3 = 1.5,
       X34 = 2,
       X4 = 2.5, 
       
C1X1 = -2.25,
C1X12 =-1.75,
C1X123 =-1.25,
C1X1234 =-0.75,
C1X2 = - 0.25,
C1X23 = 0.25,
C1X234 =0.75,
C1X3 =1.25,
C1X34 = 1.75,
C1X4 = 2.25,

C2X1 = -2,
C2X12 =-1.5,
C2X123 =-1,
C2X1234 =-0.5,
C2X2 =  0,
C2X23 = 0.5,
C2X234 =1,
C2X3 =1.5,
C2X34 = 2,
C2X4 = 2.5),

     y = c(
       X1 = 0,
       X12 = 0,
       X123 = 0, 
       X1234 = 0,
       X2 = 0,
       Y = 1,
       X23 = 0,
       X234 = 0,
       X3 = 0,
       X34 = 0,
       X4 = 0, 
       
       C1X1 = -1,
C1X12 = -1,
C1X123 = -1,
C1X1234 = -1,
C1X2 = -1,
C1X23 = -1,
C1X234 = -1,
C1X3 = -1,
C1X34 = -1,
C1X4 = -1,

C2X1 = -1,
C2X12 = -1,
C2X123 = -1,
C2X1234 = -1,
C2X2 = -1,
C2X23 = -1,
C2X234 = -1,
C2X3 = -1,
C2X34 = -1,
C2X4 = -1)))

ggdag_status(g) + theme_dag()
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Example: generate all combinations of choices
df <- expand.grid(
  outcome = c("O1",
              "O2",
              "O3",
              "O4"),
  model   = c("COX", "LOG", "LOG-B", "ME-LOG", "DT-ME", "GEE"),
  covars  = c("NONE", "AGE", "SEX", "CTR", "EDU", "SMOK", "PHYS", 
              "AGE+SEX", "AGE+CTR", "AGE+EDU", "AGE+SMOK", "AGE+PHYS")
)

# reshape to long form for plotting
decisions <- df %>% 
  mutate(spec_id = row_number()) %>%
  pivot_longer(-spec_id, names_to = "decision", values_to = "choice")

library(ggalluvial)

decisionplot <- ggplot(df,
       aes(axis1 = outcome, axis2 = model, axis3 = covars)) +
  geom_alluvium(aes(fill = outcome), knot.pos = 0.3, alpha = .6) +
  geom_stratum() +
  geom_text(stat = "stratum", aes(label = after_stat(stratum))) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = c("Outcome", "Model", "Covariates")) +
  theme_minimal() + ylab("Number of possible decisions")

decisionplot
```
